canonical_answer: A length of purple satin ribbon lies curved near the top center. A small gold button rests below the ribbon loop. Red thread is tangled loosely next to a silver sewing needle. A green plastic ruler with black markings sits at the bottom right. White text overlays identify each item clearly.

question: Describe what is happening with the ribbon and ruler.
canonical_answer: Hands with French tip manicured nails hold a light purple ribbon. A translucent green ruler lies horizontally on a white surface. The fingers press the ribbon down near the four inch mark. The ruler displays both inch and centimeter markings along the edges. The ribbon forms an arch shape before being folded.

question: Describe the visual sequence from the start of the video until the title card is fully displayed.
canonical_answer: At 0s, vertical bars of various solid colors fill the frame; at 2s, the videojug logo and title text appear on white; at 3s, a multi-colored horizontal stripe separates the logo area; at 4s, the title text How To Ribbon Bow Making is visible.

question: Describe the visual changes occurring from the host's introduction to the display of the finished bow.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a woman in a pink shirt stands against a brick wall; at 6s, a lower-third graphic displays the name Jenny Jones; at 12s, the view cuts to a purple satin bow; at 14s, the bow is shown clipped into blonde hair.
